name: Mist Bird Clausolas
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クラウソラス
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; its ATK becomes 0, and if it does, its effects are negated. These changes last until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; its ATK becomes 0, and if it does, its effects are negated. These changes last until the end of this turn.
eff:

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
